title: BlackBelt - Martial Arts Management
subtitle: Your academy in the palm of your hand
description:
BlackBelt is the digital operating system for martial arts academies. Manage students, classes, belt progressions, and attendance in one place.

Key features:
- QR Code and biometric check-in
- Belt progression tracking
- Class and schedule management
- Complete dashboard for instructors and academy owners
- Real-time push notifications
- Works offline — syncs automatically
- Profiles for students, instructors, parents, and administrators
- Attendance and engagement reports
- Multi-discipline support (BJJ, Judo, Karate, Muay Thai, and more)

Perfect for academies that want to professionalize management and deliver the best experience to their students.
promotional_text: Transform your academy with cutting-edge technology. Complete management, smart check-in, and progression tracking.
whats_new:
- Push notifications for real-time alerts
- Offline check-in with automatic sync
- Face ID and Touch ID login
- Performance and stability improvements
